description: Jina AI provides search-oriented AI services including web reading/search, embeddings, reranking, classification, and deep research workflows. Its products are used to process web pages and multimodal content for search, retrieval, and agent applications.
summary: jina.ai exposes two HTTP APIs (Search Foundation at api.jina.ai and DeepSearch at deepsearch.jina.ai), a remote MCP server at mcp.jina.ai/v1, and a Python-distributed CLI (`jina`); all use a Jina API key, with the MCP server and some Reader-backed tools optionally usable without a key at lower rate limits.
